posts.text:
Working moms deserve the support that reflects the realities they face today.

That’s why I was proud to vote to pass the Working Families Tax Cuts Act, which included long-overdue updates to three child care tax credits I fought to secure. 

Republicans listened to America’s families and delivered.


Senate Republicans (@SenateGOP)







— https://nitter.net/SenateGOP/status/2032485280716845189#m

Republicans believe EVERY man and woman who raised their hand to protect the American people by serving under DHS should get paid, including TSA agents, FEMA employees, members of our Coast Guard and Secret Service, CBP and ICE officers, and more.

posts.text:
If you miss a flight, thank a Senate Democrat. 

SIX TIMES this week Republicans tried to fully fund DHS and pay TSA workers, along with the other men and women who work every day to keep Americans safe.  

Democrats refuse because they want to defund law enforcement and take us back to Biden’s failed open border policies. They’re using hardworking Americans as political pawns in that quest.


Tom Miller (@TomMillerNews)

posts.text:
Wesley and I are praying for the congregation and community of Temple Israel in West Bloomfield Township, Michigan. 

Freedom of religion is at the core of who we are as a nation, and no one should fear violence while practicing their faith.

We must remain vigilant against the sheer evil of radical Islamic terrorism and antisemitism—it is a real, continued, and deadly threat that must be held accountable to the fullest extent of the law.

posts.text:
Four different times this afternoon Republicans offered a 2-week funding stopgap for DHS to reopen and ensure hardworking Americans get paychecks.

Each time, Democrats responded with bills that not only defund law enforcement, but defund TSA, Secret Service, Coast Guard, FEMA and more.

posts.text:
My Democratic colleagues have another opportunity to do the right thing today and vote to advance the bipartisan, bicameral DHS bill.  

We should have an open and honest debate on this legislation—which includes several reforms Democrats have asked for—in front of the American people. I sincerely hope they will join us in setting aside their politics for the American people.

Video
